ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate for 100 TJS to GBP */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* Change in exchange rate from the previous day */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in exchange rate from the previous day */,
  "high_rate" REAL /* Highest exchange rate for the day */,
  "low_rate" REAL /* Lowest exchange rate for the day */,
  "open_rate" REAL /* Opening exchange rate for the day */,
  "close_rate" REAL /* Closing exchange rate for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange rate entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange rate entry that triggered the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., significant increase, significant decrease) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of report generation (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
